name: Globa Terra Acquisition Corp

Overview We are a newly organized blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on October 18, 2024 for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses, which we refer to throughout this Annual Report as our initial business combination.
